prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.5 kg; Height 175.1 cm; BMI 20.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 176mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 207mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.7kg; 9 months ago 59.1kg; 6 months ago 57.9kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 62.5kg), Height (12 months ago 175.1cm; 9 months ago 175.1cm; 6 months ago 175.1cm; 3 months ago 175.1cm; current 175.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 20U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; current 67mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 16mg/g; 9 months ago 17mg/g; 6 months ago 17mg/g; 3 months ago 17mg/g; current 19mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 62mg/dL; 9 months ago 61mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 60mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.3g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.95 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
